data.title: Vistra Corp Completes $4 Billion Senior Notes Offering
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Vistra Corp ( (VST) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 22, 2026, Vistra Operations Company LLC completed a $4.0 billion private offering of senior notes maturing between 2028 and 2036, sold to qualified institutional buyers and non-U.S. investors and fully and unconditionally guaranteed by certain subsidiaries. The transaction, structured with detailed redemption and change-of-control protections, reflects Vistra’s ongoing use of capital markets to optimize its debt maturity profile and maintain flexibility in its financing arrangements.

Vistra received approximately $3.97 billion in net proceeds and is using or will use the funds, along with cash on hand, to repay or redeem existing indebtedness, including senior notes due February 2027 and a Term Loan B-3 facility, as well as for general corporate purposes and offering-related costs. The new notes, carrying fixed coupons ranging from 4.550% to 5.550% with semiannual interest payments beginning October 30, 2026, are subject to covenants limiting liens, mergers, and major asset sales, underscoring the company’s effort to balance investor protections with long-term balance-sheet management.

The most recent analyst rating on (VST) stock is a Buy with a $212.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Vistra Corp stock, see the VST Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on VST Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, VST is a Neutral.

The score is held up by a very constructive earnings outlook and positive multi-year cash-flow guidance, but is tempered by moderate financial-statement quality (leverage and 2025 uncertainty), bearish price trend signals, and a stretched valuation (high P/E with low yield).

To see Spark’s full report on VST stock, click here.

More about Vistra Corp

Vistra Corp., through its wholly owned subsidiary Vistra Operations Company LLC, operates in the energy and power sector, issuing senior notes and other debt instruments to support its capital structure. The company focuses on managing its financing profile and refinancing existing obligations through offerings targeted at institutional investors in U.S. and international markets.

Average Trading Volume: 4,681,449

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $55.64B

data.title: American Assets Trust Reports Q1 2026 Results and Outlook
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from American Assets ( (AAT) ).

American Assets Trust reported first quarter 2026 results on April 28, 2026, posting net income available to common stockholders of $5.1 million, or $0.08 per diluted share, and funds from operations of $0.51 per diluted share, slightly below the prior year. Net income fell $47.4 million versus the first quarter of 2025, mainly due to the absence of a prior‑year gain on the sale of Del Monte Center, higher interest expense after La Jolla Commons III was placed into service, lower occupancy at First & Main and higher rental costs, while same‑store cash NOI was flat, indicating stable core property performance.

The company strengthened its balance sheet by amending and restating its credit facility on April 1, 2026, increasing borrowing capacity to $600 million and extending the maturity to 2030, which enhances liquidity for future operations and investment. Operationally, office, retail, multifamily and hotel leasing metrics showed generally high occupancies, with office at 84.5% and retail at 97.7%, and the firm executed 43 office and retail leases covering about 275,300 square feet plus 337 multifamily leases in the quarter, with positive office rent spreads but modest pressure on cash retail rents, underscoring resilient demand but a mixed pricing environment for stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (AAT) stock is a Hold with a $20.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on American Assets stock, see the AAT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AAT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AAT is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by a stable-to-moderate financial profile: strong cash generation is offset by 2025 operating softening and leverage constraints. Technically, the stock shows weak trend/momentum, while valuation is supported by a high dividend yield and the earnings call outlook is cautious but slightly improving on FFO guidance. The expanded credit facility provides an incremental liquidity positive.

To see Spark’s full report on AAT stock, click here.

More about American Assets

American Assets Trust, Inc. is a real estate investment trust focused on owning, operating and developing a diversified portfolio of office, retail, multifamily, mixed‑use and hotel properties. The company’s assets are primarily located in select coastal and urban markets, and it generates revenue mainly from leasing commercial space and multifamily units to a variety of tenants.

Average Trading Volume: 415,219

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $1.28B

data.title: Harvard Apparatus Begins First Cellspan Esophageal Implant Trial
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Harvard Apparatus Regenerative Technology ( (HRGN) ) has issued an update.

On April 27, 2026, Harvard Apparatus Regenerative Technology announced that the first patient has been treated with its Cellspan Esophageal Implant in a Phase 1 feasibility and safety clinical trial at the Mayo Clinic in Rochester, Minnesota. This marks a significant clinical milestone for the company’s regenerative approach to esophageal disease, an area of high unmet need where current treatments are highly invasive and carry substantial morbidity.

The ongoing FDA‑regulated Phase 1 trial will enroll up to ten patients across three activated sites, with a primary endpoint of forming a continuous biological esophageal neoconduit by three months and a secondary endpoint of developing a mucosal lining by twelve months. Executives emphasized the operational complexity and cross-functional coordination required to deliver the first implant, highlighting strengthened partnerships with Mayo Clinic and IQVIA Biotech as the company advances its clinical program and seeks to solidify its position in regenerative esophageal therapies.

Spark’s Take on HRGN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, HRGN is a Neutral.

The score is primarily pressured by weak financial performance (no revenue, sustained losses, and ongoing cash burn) and a bearish technical setup (price below key moving averages with negative MACD). A negative P/E offers limited valuation support, and the recent insider bridge financing underscores liquidity risk.

To see Spark’s full report on HRGN stock, click here.

More about Harvard Apparatus Regenerative Technology

Harvard Apparatus Regenerative Technology, Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company specializing in regenerative-medicine treatments for disorders of the gastrointestinal system and other organs caused by cancer, trauma or birth defects. Its proprietary cell-therapy platform uses a patient’s own stem cells to regenerate damaged organs, and the company holds multiple U.S. and international patents along with orphan-drug designations in the U.S. and Europe.

The company previously enabled the world’s first successful regeneration of the esophagus in a patient with esophageal cancer in August 2017 at the Mayo Clinic, with results published in 2021, underscoring its focus on next-generation organ regeneration solutions that could reduce dependence on donor organs, animal transplants or permanent artificial implants.

Average Trading Volume: 2,424

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $28.22M

See more data about HRGN stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

FS KKR Capital ( (FSK) ) has shared an announcement.

FS KKR Capital Corp. is a publicly traded business development company that provides customized credit solutions to private middle market U.S. companies. The firm primarily invests in senior secured debt and, to a lesser extent, subordinated debt, and is advised by FS/KKR Advisor, a partnership between Future Standard and KKR Credit.

Future Standard is a global alternative asset manager serving institutional and private wealth clients across private equity, credit and real estate. KKR Credit, a subsidiary of KKR & Co. Inc., contributes its global investment expertise and capital markets capabilities to the advisory partnership, reinforcing FSK’s position in middle market credit investing.

FS KKR Capital Corp. announced on April 28, 2026 that it had rescheduled the release of its first quarter 2026 financial results and the related earnings call due to a scheduling conflict. The company will now publish its results before the market opens and host a live webcasted conference call at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time on Monday, May 11, 2026, with supporting investor materials and a replay available on its website.

The rescheduling of the earnings release and call adjusts the company’s near-term investor communications timeline but does not signal any stated change to its underlying operations or strategy. Analysts and investors will still receive detailed financial information and management commentary on May 11, 2026, preserving transparency around performance in FSK’s core middle market credit portfolio.

Stellar Bancorp ( (STEL) ) has shared an announcement.

On April 28, 2026, Stellar Bancorp reported first-quarter 2026 net income of $27.0 million, or $0.53 per diluted share, up from $26.1 million, or $0.51 per share, in the fourth quarter of 2025, supported by loan growth of $287.4 million and a modestly higher tax-equivalent net interest margin of 4.24%. Adjusted net income excluding merger-related costs reached $29.6 million, the bank redeemed $30 million of subordinated notes on April 1, 2026, and management highlighted that regulatory approvals have been received and a May 27, 2026 shareholder meeting has been set to vote on the planned merger with Prosperity Bancshares, which is expected to create a larger-scale Texas banking platform with enhanced capabilities and potential long-term value for stakeholders.

The latest results show Stellar’s core earnings momentum and balance sheet strengthening ahead of its proposed combination with Prosperity Bancshares, as rising adjusted profitability and disciplined capital actions may improve the merged entity’s financial flexibility. With integration planning already underway and resilient market conditions in its footprint, the company appears positioned to leverage increased scale in Texas banking, which could influence competitive dynamics and shareholder returns in the regional banking sector.

data.title: Datavault AI Secures Major Quantum-Ready Network Funding
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Datavault AI ( (DVLT) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 26, 2026, Datavault AI Inc. entered into a binding term sheet with Scilex Holding Company for a proposed $120 million cash contribution, to be funded in tranches through year-end 2026, in exchange for a multi-tier revenue participation in Datavault AI’s planned quantum-ready GPU “Quantum-Ready Edge Network” across about 100 U.S. cities. The deal structure grants Scilex escalating and then declining revenue shares tied solely to network-derived gross revenues, capped at $1.2 billion before shifting to a perpetual 5% share over the GPUs’ useful life.

Datavault AI plans to use the Scilex funding exclusively to deploy its SanQtum-based, quantum-ready micro edge data center network with partner Available Infrastructure, targeting advanced AI, high-performance computing and tokenized real-world asset services, and projecting rollouts from initial sites in New York and Philadelphia in the second quarter of 2026 to 100 locations within 36 months of closing. If completed, the transaction, combined with anticipated asset sales, would provide Datavault AI with a substantial non-dilutive capital infusion and aligns Scilex’s long-term interests with network performance, but execution remains contingent on definitive agreements, operational milestones, regulatory approvals and market conditions, with the company cautioning investors that the deal may not close or achieve its targeted outcomes.

The most recent analyst rating on (DVLT) stock is a Buy with a $3.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Datavault AI stock, see the DVLT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on DVLT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, DVLT is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by mixed financial performance—strong growth and improved balance sheet but ongoing losses and persistent cash burn. The latest earnings call adds support via upbeat guidance and a milestone profitable quarter, while technicals are only moderately constructive. Valuation remains pressured due to negative earnings and no dividend, and corporate events are offset by Nasdaq bid-price compliance risk and potential dilution from stock-based deals.

To see Spark’s full report on DVLT stock, click here.

More about Datavault AI

Datavault AI Inc., headquartered in Philadelphia and listed on Nasdaq as DVLT, provides AI-driven data monetization, credentialing, digital engagement and real‑world asset tokenization technologies. Its cloud-based platform spans Acoustic Sciences, featuring patented WiSA, ADIO and Sumerian audio technologies, and Data Sciences, delivering Web 3.0-enabled data valuation, secure monetization and high-performance computing solutions across sectors such as sports, entertainment, biotech, fintech, real estate and healthcare.

The company’s Information Data Exchange supports Digital Twins and licensing of name, image and likeness by attaching physical assets to immutable metadata, aiming to foster responsible AI with integrity. Its technology stack is customizable, offering AI- and machine learning-based automation, third‑party integrations, analytics, marketing automation and advertising monitoring for enterprise clients in data-intensive industries.

Average Trading Volume: 39,163,161

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $448.3M

For a thorough assessment of DVLT stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Adicet Bio ( (ACET) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 27, 2026, Adicet Bio, Inc. entered into an exchange agreement with RA Capital Management, L.P. and RA Capital Healthcare Fund, L.P. under which RA Capital exchanged 250,000 shares of Adicet’s common stock for a pre-funded warrant to acquire an equal number of common shares at a nominal exercise price of $0.0001 per share. The pre-funded warrant, issued in a private, unregistered transaction relying on a securities law exemption, is exercisable on a cashless basis and includes ownership and voting caps of 9.99%, adjustable up to but not exceeding 19.99%, effectively providing RA Capital with flexible future participation in the company’s equity while limiting immediate concentration of control.
